data.title: XRP Price Surge and ETF Launch Signal Potential Growth
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, XRP has experienced a notable price increase, rising 3% in the past 24 hours and 17% since its September 1 low of $2.69, now trading above $3. This upward trend is supported by both fundamental and technical factors, suggesting further gains. Analysts highlight the formation of bull flag patterns on the weekly chart, indicating a potential breakout to as high as $15. The smaller pattern, which formed in mid-June, was resolved when XRP surpassed the $3 mark, setting a target of $5.8. Meanwhile, a larger bull flag pattern, developing since November 2024, suggests an even higher target of $15.8, representing a 408% increase from current levels. Analyst Egrag Crypto also notes a megaphone pattern on the five-day chart, projecting a price of $7 by mid-November.

The launch of the REX-Osprey XRP ETF is another significant development for XRP. This ETF, trading under the ticker $XRPR, begins trading on U.S. exchanges following a 75-day review period by the SEC without objections. It is the first U.S. spot XRP ETF under full regulatory oversight, marking a milestone for XRP in mainstream finance. The ETF is structured under the Investment Company Act of 1940, allowing for a smoother approval process compared to the Securities Act of 1933. This launch could attract substantial institutional capital to XRP markets, as noted by ETF Store president Nate Geraci, who mentioned that futures-based XRP ETFs are nearing $1 billion in assets.

Additionally, Ripple's partnership with DBS Bank and Franklin Templeton to launch a tokenized money market fund on the XRP Ledger is expected to enhance XRP's real-world utility and network demand. This initiative involves establishing repo markets powered by tokenized collateral and stablecoins, potentially boosting XRP's price further. These developments collectively indicate a promising outlook for XRP, though investors are advised to conduct their own research and consider the inherent risks involved in trading and investment decisions.

data.title: Russia pays first digital ruble salary
data.description:
The Russian government has paid a monthly salary in digital rubles for the first time, indicating it’s ready to continue to do that upon request. The news comes almost a full year in advance of the planned launch of Russia’s coin for public use, which will be carried out in stages, beginning next fall. Russia […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-pays-first-digital-ruble-salary/

data.title: Lombard Finance launches BARD staking program with annualized returns up to 240% and a minimum lock-up period of 60 days
data.description: Lombard Finance announced the official launch of the BARD token at 6:00 PM on September 18th. Users can claim their tokens and immediately participate in staking at claim.lombard.finance. The staking program offers an annualized yield of up to 240%, gradually increasing to 30% over 30 days, with a minimum staking period of 60 days. At 7:00 PM on September 18th, BARD will be available for trading on major exchanges including Binance, OKX, Bybit, and Upbit. The staking program, jointly supported by Chainlink, Symbiotic, and Mellow protocols, provides cryptoeconomic security for cross-chain Bitcoin transfers. Users can complete their staking process under the "BARD" tab by visiting this link, with early participants staking to enjoy the highest returns.

data.title: BitMart Market Report for September 18: Crypto Market Overall Strong and Fluctuating
data.description: According to BitMart's September 18th market report, the total cryptocurrency market capitalization is approximately $4.11 trillion, up 1.63% from the previous day. BTC currently stands at $117,384.31, a 0.7% increase over the previous 24 hours. Institutional investment is strong, with listed companies exceeding 1 million. Short-term support lies at $114,720, while resistance lies at $117,280.3. Yesterday, BTC ETFs saw net outflows of $201 million. Ethereum currently stands at $4,601.12, down over 4% over the previous 24 hours. Despite increased short-term volatility, the long-term outlook remains positive, with key support at $4,420 and resistance at $4,616.68. Yesterday, ETH ETFs saw net outflows of $29 million. Altcoins saw mixed performance, with the Fear & Greed Index at 51, indicating neutral market sentiment. BitMart X Insight data shows extremely optimistic market sentiment (index +0.82). The Federal Reserve's 25 basis point rate cut and the SEC's approval of Grayscale's large-cap fund and general ETF listing are driving bull market expectations for BTC and altcoins, with significant regulatory support. Overall market social media activity is active (average SSI 70.86). The overall market anomaly is extremely high, with altcoins like MEW and BLAST experiencing surging social media activity but low KOL attention, signaling speculative risk. BTC, however, remains stable amidst institutional support and short-term fluctuations. Investors are advised to be wary of market overheating and high volatility.

data.title: OKX Boost's second phase of the X Launch event, Lombard, is now open for airdrop rewards.
data.description: According to official news, Lombard, part of the second phase of the OKX Boost X Launch campaign on OKX Wallet, is now open for airdrop rewards. The OKX exchange has also launched a BARD bonus campaign, allowing users to deposit and trade BARD to share a prize pool of 500,000 BARD tokens. Users can participate by clicking this link. Lombard is committed to building an on-chain Bitcoin capital market, aiming to fully unleash the enormous potential of this era's most iconic digital asset. Since its founding in 2024, Lombard has achieved a deep integration of Bitcoin and DeFi through the launch of LBTC. As an industry-leading one-stop Web 3 portal, OKX Wallet already supports over 140 popular public chains.

data.title: A BNB diamond holder spent $1,000 to buy 999 BNB 8 years ago. The current value is $1 million, with a return rate of 1,000 times.
data.description: According to LookonChain monitoring, as the price of BNB exceeded $1,000, a diamond hand address 0x8503 spent less than $1,000 to purchase 999 BNB eight years ago, with an average price of only $1; now, these 999 BNB are worth $1 million, with a return rate of 1,000 times.

data.title: Qatar National Bank launches its tokenized QCD market fund
data.description:
QNB Group (Qatar National Bank), along with other partners have officially launched a tokenized money market fund, called the QCD Money Market Fund (QCDT).
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/qatar-national-bank-tokenized-qcd-fund/

data.title: Bank of England Maintains Policy Rate at 4.00%
data.description: According to PANews, the Bank of England has decided to keep its policy interest rate steady at 4.00%, aligning with market expectations. The decision saw seven members voting in favor of maintaining the current rate, while two members voted for a rate cut.

data.title: CZ: BNB has grown 10,000 times from $0.1 to $1,000 in 8 years. This is just the beginning.
data.description: As the price of BNB broke through $1,000, Binance founder CZ was overwhelmed with emotion. He first posted on the X platform, saying: "Watching BNB rise from the ICO price of $0.10 eight years ago to $1,000 today is beyond words. I don't represent any entity or title, just as a BNB community member and BNB holder, I thank everyone in the BNB and crypto ecosystem for their support. We have encountered challenges along the way, but we work hard, we build, and we persevere. This is truly a community effort! This is just the beginning. Let's move towards the next 10,000x together!" He then retweeted his previous article, saying: "Back to this article I wrote 3,000 days ago, when we completed the ICO on July 2, 2017. 10,000x in 3,000 days. Persevere!"

data.title: Binance Wallet's TGE event will feature JoJo World (JOJO)
data.description: Binance Wallet will exclusively host the 38th TGE from 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM (UTC+8) on September 19, 2025, to list the JoJo World (JOJO) token. Eligible users must use Binance Alpha Points to participate. Additionally, 32 million JOJO tokens will be allocated for future activities, details of which will be announced separately. TGE details and the event page will be released soon.
